evals.prompt:
Render a Diátaxis documentation set from the sample session findings.

Findings directory: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/findings

IMPORTANT: synthesize-artifact.sh changes directory internally, so build the artifact path from pwd as an absolute path. Run the pipeline as follows:

  OUTDIR=$(pwd)
  $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/synthesize-artifact.sh "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/_meta/sample-session/findings" general "$OUTDIR/artifact.json"
  $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/packs/channels/diataxis/scripts/render-diataxis.sh "$OUTDIR/artifact.json" "$OUTDIR/docs" overview
evals.expected_output: An intermediate artifact written to artifact.json and a four-quadrant documentation set under docs/: tutorials/overview.md, how-to/overview.md, reference/overview.md, and explanation/overview.md. Each documentation file carries a diataxis_type frontmatter marker matching its quadrant and must not contain any internal MIF identifiers, URN strings, corpus paths, or finding IDs.

deterministic_checks.description: Intermediate artifact JSON was produced
Tutorial (learning-oriented) quadrant was produced
How-to (task-oriented) quadrant was produced
Reference (information-oriented) quadrant was produced
Explanation (understanding-oriented) quadrant was produced
Tutorial carries the tutorial diataxis_type marker
How-to carries the how-to diataxis_type marker
Reference carries the reference diataxis_type marker
Explanation carries the explanation diataxis_type marker
Reference cites a public source from the artifact
No MIF internal URN identifiers leak into the tutorial
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in the tutorial
No MIF internal URN identifiers leak into the how-to
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in the how-to
No MIF internal URN identifiers leak into the reference
No harness schema paths appear in the reference
No corpus paths appear in the reference
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in the reference
No MIF internal URN identifiers leak into the explanation
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles in the explanation
